trans-unit.source: helps you keep track of what needs to be bought from the store.
Log in with Google and create your first shared list today!
Account with email already exists. Try logging in with instead.
Please confirm the email this invitation was sent to
If you wish do delete all data associated with your user account send an email with the request to
Are you sure you want to delete list ""?
You've been invited to a shared shopping list
Check your inbox for a secure sign-in link to accept this invitation.
Sign in to accept this invitation and start sharing the list.
This invitation was sent to a different email address
Use the address this invite was sent to. We can email a secure sign-in link to the correct address, or you can sign in with a different account.
Sign in with a different account
Failed to send the sign-in link. Please try again.
Failed to accept invite. Please try again.
This list doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
Are you sure you want to leave this list? You will lose access to all items.
Are you sure you want to remove from this list?
You don't have permission to remove this member
Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation to ?
You don't have permission to invite people to this list
Invalid input. Please check the email addresses
Network error. Please check your connection and try again
Please sign in to send invitations
Failed to send invitations. Please try again
Are you sure you want to reactivate all items?
Are you sure you want to remove ""?
Shown to other members in shared lists
Browser does not support background updates. Just reload the page to get the latest version.
